items.prompt_text: Developed and published under contract with the New Y ork State Education Department by NWEA, a division of HMH, 14720 Energy Way, Apple Valley, MN 55124. Copyright © 2025 by the New Y ork State Education Department. TIPS FOR TAKING THE TEST Here are some ideas to help you do your best: • Read each question carefully. Take your time. • You have a ruler that you can use on the test if it helps you answer the question. Page 1 Which story problem can be represented by the expression ? A There are pieces of candy and are eaten. B There are buses with students on each bus. C Mila has marbles in a bag and puts more marbles into the bag. D Scott has toy cars and gives an equal number of toy cars to each of friends. Which fraction has a value equivalent to ? A B C D
